dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Iris. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Iris! How can I help you today?
I work as a technical writer. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A technical writer — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
Outside of work I enjoy knitting, writing. I also like reading about distributed systems.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
By the way, I'm also interested in Rust.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else.
